atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a new right eye twitch.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports feeling an urge to blink her eye and then feels better afterwards.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports feeling an urge to move her face and then it moves and she feels better.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports being kicked and pulled on her hair by another girl named Isabella.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports enjoying going to McDonald's and eating McNuggets.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any family history of seizures.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any family history of Tourette's syndrome.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports eating well and playing with her friends.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports engaging in her normal activities.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies fever.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies coughing.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies headache.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Reflexes are two plus and symmetric.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Neurological exam shows no focal neurologic findings.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's presentation is most consistent with a transient tic disorder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: No seizure activity was observed.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I am going to order radiographs of the right eye to rule out structural abnormalities.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I am also going to recommend physical therapy to help manage the tics.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: We will continue to monitor Karen's symptoms.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I will advise the patient's father to avoid drawing attention to the tic and to ignore it.
